blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
